COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100018772) FILED BY PETITIONER CBC SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-09-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CBC SETTLEMENT FUNDING'S FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PAYMENT SCHEDULE SET. SEE MINUTES AND/OR TRANSCRIPT FOR DETAILS. MR. SHAFAI WILL ASSIST MS. MATTINGLY. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

SHAFAI IS TO INFORM MR. MATTINGLY OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jun-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Shafai of Law Offices of John Z. Shafai telephone number 310-788-2889 appeared by telephone for Petitioner CBC Settlement Funding, LLC.
Respondent McCabe Mattingly telephone number 415-684-5769 in Propria Persona.
Nancy Mattingly (Mother of McCabe Mattingly) also present.

Mr. Mattingly stated that he no longer wants to sell a portion of the settlement. PETITIONER CBC SETTLEMENT FUNDING'S First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is dismissed without prejudice. Ms. Mattingly asked to be allowed to pay back funds advanced ($1,360.00) to Mr. Mattingly in five payments of $250.00 a month commencing July 15, 2016 and one lump sum of $175.00 on the sixth month. Mr. Shafai will assist Ms. Mattingly.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/SB)

Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Continued To Jun-09-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Shafai of Law Offices of John Shafai telephone number 310-788-2889 appeared by telephone for Petitioner CBC Settlement Funding, LLC.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that McCabe Mattingly was not present. PETITIONER CBC SETTLEMENT FUNDING'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is continued to June 9, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Mr. Shafai is to inform Mr. Mattingly of the new hearing date.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

*** Mr. Mattingly appeared after the matter had concluded. The Court attempted to contact Mr. Shafai so that the matter could proceed, but was unsuccessful. The continued hearing date of June 9, 2016 remains and Mr. Mattingly has been informed.
